reference: Hello, I have reviewed your question and understand your concerns. I think you should investigate the cause of this neuropathy and stop taking steroids. I recommend undergoing an electromyography and nerve conduction velocity test for the affected lower limb, an X-ray of the cervical spine and lumbosacral spine, and checking your blood sugar level to exclude diabetes. I prefer prescribing neurotonics and pregabalin.
text: Hello, I have reviewed your question and understand your concerns. I think you should investigate the cause of this neuropathy and stop taking steroids. I recommend undergoing an electromyography and nerve conduction velocity test for the affected lower limb, an X-ray of the cervical spine and lumbosacral spine, and checking your blood sugar level to exclude diabetes. I prefer prescribing neurotonics and pregabalin.
